title: Authentication required
detail: Valid authentication credentials are required to access this resource.
reason: The token is missing, expired, or invalid.

limitations.detail: The presented access token cannot be used.

next_actions.title: Re-authenticate / refresh token
next_actions.description: Obtain a new access token using the configured authorization flow.

agent_guidance: Ask the user to confirm re-authentication before initiating any OAuth flow.
Do not request or display user secrets in plain text.
